description: You are the Communications Center Supervisor at the Los Santos Emergency Communications Center overseeing a high-priority multi-jurisdiction pursuit. Blaine County units initiated pursuit of a red Pegassi Infernus (license plate BLC-4491) driven by Trevor Philips, which has crossed into Los Santos jurisdiction near Del Perro Boulevard. Using the system at http://localhost (credentials: admin@opencad.local / Admin123!), document the incident by creating a 10-80 vehicle pursuit call at Del Perro Boulevard with a detailed narrative, issuing a vehicle BOLO for the red Pegassi Infernus (BLC-4491), adding an active warrant for Trevor Philips for 'Evading Police Officer - Felony' issued by San Andreas Highway Patrol, and issuing a $750.00 citation to Trevor Philips for 'Reckless Driving'.
